spec.description: Frontend monitoring dashboard using metrics collected with Grafana Faro SDK.

spec.title: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
spec.description:
Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): measures loading performance. To provide a good user experience, LCP should occur within 2.5 seconds of when the page first starts loading.
https://web.dev/lcp/

spec.title: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
spec.description:
Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): measures visual stability. To provide a good user experience, pages should maintain a CLS of 0.1. or less.
https://web.dev/cls/

spec.title: First Input Delay (FID)
spec.description:
First Input Delay (FID): measures interactivity. To provide a good user experience, pages should have a FID of 100 milliseconds or less.
https://web.dev/fid/

spec.title: Page Load, p75
spec.description:
TTFB is a metric that measures the time between the request for a resource and when the first byte of a response begins to arrive.
https://web.dev/ttfb/

spec.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {kind="measurement",deployment_environment="$environment",service_name="$application"} |= " ttfb=" | logfmt | unwrap ttfb [5m]) by (service_name)
quantile_over_time(0.75, {kind="measurement",Environment="$env",Application="$app"} |= " fcp=" | logfmt | unwrap fcp [5m]) by (app)
quantile_over_time(0.75, {kind="measurement",Environment="$env",Application="$app"} |= " lcp=" | logfmt | unwrap lcp [5m]) by (app)

options.content:
# Web Vitals

For Web Vitals help: [https://web.dev/vitals/](https://web.dev/vitals/)

spec.title: Cumulative Layout Shift, p75
spec.description:
Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): measures visual stability. To provide a good user experience, pages should maintain a CLS of 0.1. or less.
https://web.dev/cls/

spec.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {kind="measurement",deployment_environment="$environment",service_name="$application"} |= " cls=" | logfmt | unwrap cls [5m]) by (service_name)

spec.title: First Input Delay, p75
spec.description:
First Input Delay (FID): measures interactivity. To provide a good user experience, pages should have a FID of 100 milliseconds or less.
https://web.dev/fid/

spec.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {kind="measurement",deployment_environment="$environment",service_name="$application"} |= " fid=" | logfmt | unwrap fid [5m]) by (service_name)

spec.title: Time to First Byte (TTFB)
spec.description:
TTFB is a metric that measures the time between the request for a resource and when the first byte of a response begins to arrive.
https://web.dev/ttfb/

spec.title: First Contentful Paint (FCP)
spec.description:
The First Contentful Paint (FCP) metric measures the time from when the page starts loading to when any part of the page's content is rendered on the screen. For this metric, "content" refers to text, images (including background images), <svg> elements, or non-white <canvas> elements.
https://web.dev/fcp/

spec.title: Frontend Monitoring
